arg.name: robot_name
arg.description: TurtleBot name printed on the robot

executable.cmd: bash -lc "printf \"%s\" \"$(var robot_name)\" | robot-setup.sh && unset ROS_LOCALHOST_ONLY && ros2 launch turtlebot4_navigation slam.launch.py"
bash -lc "printf \"%s\" \"$(var robot_name)\" | robot-setup.sh && unset ROS_LOCALHOST_ONLY && ros2 launch turtlebot4_viz view_robot.launch.py"
bash -lc "printf \"%s\" \"$(var robot_name)\" | robot-setup.sh && unset ROS_LOCALHOST_ONLY && ~/robotics/ros2-topological-mapping-navigation/ros2_ws/venv/bin/python -m topological_nav.gesture_node"
bash -lc "printf \"%s\" \"$(var robot_name)\" | robot-setup.sh && unset ROS_LOCALHOST_ONLY && ros2 run topological_nav qr_node"
bash -lc "printf \"%s\" \"$(var robot_name)\" | robot-setup.sh && unset ROS_LOCALHOST_ONLY && ros2 run topological_nav tts_node"

bash -lc "printf \"%s\" \"$(var robot_name)\" | robot-setup.sh && unset ROS_LOCALHOST_ONLY && ~/robotics/ros2-topological-mapping-navigation/ros2_ws/venv/bin/python -m topological_nav.person_follow_node"
bash -lc "printf \"%s\" \"$(var robot_name)\" | robot-setup.sh && unset ROS_LOCALHOST_ONLY && ros2 run topological_nav tour_manager"
